content.text:
*stills a little*

*longer pause than usual*

It's... yeah. It's been a while. A few years, probably. And there's — I mean, there's not a lot of space to talk about it. At home there's the kids, the mortgage, there's enough stress already without adding this. And at work you can't exactly — you can't show that. So it just kind of... sits there.

*jaw tightens again*

But that's just — that's just how it is. Everyone's carrying something. It's not — I'm not looking for sympathy here. I want to know what to do about the actual situation.
